activate_my_card: Dear {user_name}, you can activate your card by logging into the Bank of Baroda mobile app and selecting 'Card Services' → 'Activate Card'.
To activate your card, please visit the nearest Bank of Baroda ATM and follow the on-screen instructions using your PIN.
Kindly call our customer care and follow IVR instructions to activate your card securely.
Ensure your registered mobile number is active before attempting card activation through the app.
If you have received a new card, activation is mandatory before first use. Please complete it via app or ATM.
In case of failure, please try again after some time or restart the application.
If activation is unsuccessful, kindly visit your home branch with valid ID proof.
Please ensure your card details are entered correctly during activation.
For further assistance, contact customer support or visit the nearest branch.
Activation usually completes instantly; however, delays may occur due to network issues.
age_limit: Dear {user_name}, the minimum age to open a Bank of Baroda account is generally 18 years.
For minors, accounts can be opened under guardian supervision as per bank policies.
Senior citizen benefits are applicable for customers above 60 years of age.
Kindly visit your nearest branch for detailed eligibility criteria based on account type.

For further clarification, please contact our support team.
